## Manual step to go live (run as Admin in cmd.exe)

```bat
schtasks /create /tn "YNAI5-Launcher" /tr "cmd.exe /c \"C:\Users\shema\OneDrive\Desktop\YNAI5-SU\projects\system-health\launcher.bat\"" /sc ONLOGON /rl HIGHEST /delay 0000:30 /f
```

```bat

del "C:\Users\shema\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Windows\Start Menu\Programs\Startup\startup.bat"
```

**Start immediately (no reboot):**
